site.name: Adam & Eve
site.mechanism_justification: This is a custom ASP.NET-based platform (PHE, Inc.) with no major ecommerce framework detected. Product pages are server-rendered with full content available via direct HTTP — titles, prices, descriptions, specifications, reviews, and images are all present in the HTML without JavaScript rendering. The pre-verified probe confirmed direct HTTP access works without any anti-bot blocking.

anti_bot.details: No anti-bot protection detected. Direct HTTP requests return full page content. No Cloudflare, Akamai, PerimeterX, or CAPTCHA challenges observed.

connectivity.notes: Direct HTTP fetch returns complete server-rendered HTML. No JavaScript rendering or proxy needed.

product_discovery.url_pattern_notes: Product URLs follow the pattern: /{category}/{subcategory}/sp-{slug}-{numeric-product-id}.aspx. The product ID is a numeric value (e.g., 108069) embedded in the URL before the .aspx extension. SKU codes (e.g., E194, 115H) are also present in the page data attributes but not in the URL. Category paths can be 2-3 levels deep.

product_page_structure.price_display: HTML rendered with Reg price, Sale price, and promo code pricing (e.g., 'Reg $54.99', 'Only $27.50'). Prices are text in the DOM, not behind JS.
product_page_structure.specifications: Structured specification table with fields: Brand, Colors, Features, Length, Material, Toy Power Source, Width
product_page_structure.reviews: Inline reviews with star ratings, review text, dates, and verified buyer badges. Rating summary with count available.
product_page_structure.breadcrumbs: Breadcrumbs present: Home > Sex Toys > Vibrators > Clitoral Vibrators > Product Name
product_page_structure.description: Full product description in HTML along with 'Key Features' bullet list
product_page_structure.notes: Product pages are fully server-rendered. All product data (title, price, description, specs, reviews, images) is available in the raw HTML response without JavaScript execution.

rate_limiting.justification: Custom platform with no anti-bot, but reasonable delay to avoid triggering rate limits on a custom ASP.NET site
